description: Reconfigure the PVE host: enable addon-ssl (proxvex-signed cert for the web UI on :8006) and addon-oidc (oidc-zitadel realm via pveum CLI). The 'proxmox' application is hidden, runs reconfigure-only against the host (vm_id=0), joins zitadel/default's oidc_default stack so addon-oidc inherits ZITADEL_HOST.
